name: thefroject-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by The Froject. Skills, commands, and rules for every role.

plugins.name: thefroject-marketing
plugins.description: 12 skills, 5 commands, and 3 rules for content creation, campaigns, SEO, and analytics.

plugins.name: thefroject-sales
plugins.description: Sales workspace toolkit: outreach, deal strategy, competitor intel, pipeline management, and battlecards.

plugins.name: thefroject-operations
plugins.description: Operations workspace toolkit: process optimization, compliance, vendor management, SOPs, and project management.

plugins.name: thefroject-customer-success
plugins.description: Customer success toolkit: churn prevention, health scoring, QBRs, renewal strategy, and escalation frameworks.

plugins.name: thefroject-people-culture
plugins.description: People & culture toolkit: job descriptions, interview design, performance reviews, DEI audits, and onboarding.

plugins.name: thefroject-finance
plugins.description: Finance workspace toolkit: budgeting, forecasting, financial reporting, billing ops, and audit preparation.

plugins.name: thefroject-software
plugins.description: Software development toolkit: code review, TDD, debugging, security audits, refactoring, and CI/CD workflows.

plugins.name: thefroject-data-science
plugins.description: Data science toolkit: data pipelines, analysis, visualization, model evaluation, and documentation.

plugins.name: thefroject-product
plugins.description: Product management toolkit: PRDs, roadmaps, user research, metrics, launch planning, and stakeholder updates.

plugins.name: thefroject-research
plugins.description: Research toolkit: literature review, user interviews, data analysis, multi-source research, and synthesis.
